plugins.name: spt
plugins.description: Spacetime agent messaging and live agent system for Claude Code

plugins.name: screen-timelapse
plugins.description: MCP server for capturing screen timelapse sequences and compiling grid images for AI agent visual debugging

plugins.name: everything
plugins.description: Instant file search via voidtools Everything 1.5a HTTP API — skill teaches Claude to query the local Everything HTTP JSON endpoint. Invoke as /everything:search.

plugins.name: sptc
plugins.description: Spacetime (spt) adapter for Claude Code — agent messaging, live agents, and spt-core bootstrap. Thin skeleton; logic rides the spt binary + adapter manifest (spt-core-conducted). Invoke as /sptc:*.
